mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN x.activityType = 'OPERATING' AND x.transaction_type = #{incomeType} THEN x.amount WHEN x.activityType = 'OPERATING' AND x.transaction_type = #{expenseType} THEN -x.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS operatingNetCash, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN x.activityType = 'INVESTING' AND x.transaction_type = #{incomeType} THEN x.amount WHEN x.activityType = 'INVESTING' AND x.transaction_type = #{expenseType} THEN -x.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS investingNetCash, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN x.activityType = 'FINANCING' AND x.transaction_type = #{incomeType} THEN x.amount WHEN x.activityType = 'FINANCING' AND x.transaction_type = #{expenseType} THEN -x.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS financingNetCash FROM ( SELECT t.transaction_type, t.amount, CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%INVEST%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%ASSET%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%固定资产%' THEN 'INVESTING' WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%FINANC%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%LOAN%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%BORROW%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%CAPITAL%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%融资%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(t.category, '')) LIKE '%借款%' THEN 'FINANCING' ELSE 'OPERATING' END AS activityType FROM finance_transaction t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.status = #{successStatus} AND (t.transaction_type = #{incomeType} OR t.transaction_type = #{expenseType}) AND t.transaction_period = #{period} ) x
